violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoop handles are in contact with the food product in the sugar, flour, and salsa bins.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Cut strawberries, onions, and stored ham (in zip lock bag) not date marked in the refrigerator. -At inspection the employee stated the salsa was from the freezer and was not date marked appropriately when placed in the refrigerator.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Food in ice cream bucket not labeled. other items not date mark.
